title: About & Help
subtitle: Your next-generation personal media center to organize, enrich, and play your local library.

notices.privacy_intro: Swaya is designed with privacy in mind:

points.local_only: All database records, settings, and files are stored strictly locally on your machine.
points.api_keys: Third-party API keys are stored securely in your local configuration.
points.network: External network connections are only made to fetch metadata from active providers you configure.
points.logs: Application logs are stored locally and are never shared automatically.

license_body.p1: Swaya is a commercial proprietary application. All rights, including copyright and intellectual property rights, are reserved and owned exclusively by the developer.
license_body.p2: Swaya is distributed under a hybrid licensing model, offering monthly or annual subscription plans alongside a one-time lifetime purchase option. Usage of this software requires an active, valid license associated with your account.
license_body.p3: You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to install and run the software on personal devices for personal use, in accordance with your active plan.
license_body.p4: Any unauthorized copying, modification, distribution, redistribution, decompilation, or reverse engineering of the software code and assets is strictly prohibited.

notices.third_party_intro: Swaya is built with gratitude using open-source libraries and APIs:

third_party_points.ui: UI Components & States: Electron, React, Vite, TailwindCSS (for legacy parts), Zustand, React Router DOM, TanStack React Query, Lucide React, and other open-source NPM packages.
third_party_points.backend: Backend Framework: FastAPI, Uvicorn, Python, SQLite, SQLAlchemy, Alembic, Pydantic, and GuessIt.
third_party_points.media: Media & OS Integration: MPV player integration, Pillow (image processing), Watchdog (file system monitoring), PyWin32, and icoextract.
third_party_points.metadata: Metadata Scrapers: TMDb, FansDB, PornDB, StashDB, and others.

third_party_highlight.tmdb_body: This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.

notices.special_thanks_intro: For their ideas, guidance, and inspiration:
notices.third_party_thanks: A huge thank you to all open-source developers, maintainers, and community metadata providers!

tmdb.title: TMDb API Integration
tmdb.desc: TMDb (The Movie Database) is a free movie and TV show database. By entering your API key, SWAYA will automatically fetch movie posters, backdrops, synopses, and cast details. The process is completely free and takes about 2 minutes.
tmdb.step_signup_desc: First, create a free account on the themoviedb.org website. The registration requires a unique username, password, and a valid email address. Make sure to complete the profile signup form to access API settings later.
tmdb.step_email_desc: TMDb will send an activation email to your registered email address. Check your inbox (or spam folder) and click on the verification email from TMDb, as highlighted in red on the image.
tmdb.step_activate_desc: Open the verification email and click the 'Activate My Account' button to verify your profile.
tmdb.step_login_desc: Once activated, log in with your credentials to access your account settings and generate your API key.
tmdb.step_api_desc: After logging in, navigate to the API request page. Click on the 'Developer' link as highlighted in red on the screenshot to start your request.
tmdb.step_terms_desc: In the terms popup that appears, check the checkbox to accept the Terms of Use, then confirm you are using it for personal/developer use by clicking the blue button on the right side.
tmdb.step_details_desc: You need to fill out this form to request your API key. Feel free to use your own information, or click the buttons below to copy the template values quickly (please use your own registered email address for the email field). Once done, click the 'Subscribe' button highlighted in red at the bottom.
tmdb.step_access_desc: One last step before getting the key: on the page after submitting the details, click the highlighted link 'Access your API key details here.' to view your API Key and Read Access Token.
tmdb.step_save_desc: Copy your API Read Access Token (the upper box highlighted in red on the image) and your API Key (the lowest box highlighted in red), then paste them below and click Save.

omdb.title: OMDb API Integration
omdb.desc: OMDb API allows SWAYA to download external ratings (IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic). The key is free and takes about 1 minute.
omdb.step_req_desc: Go to the OMDb request page. Choose the FREE tier (1,000 requests/day), enter a valid email address (required to receive the key), fill in the name field (e.g. 'Movie Maniac'), and copy the Use description template below. Finally, click the Submit button highlighted in red on the screenshot.
omdb.step_req_btn: Open OMDb API Key Request Page
omdb.step_email_desc: Check your email inbox (the example uses Gmail but any provider works). Open the automated email sent by OMDb API, as shown on the screenshot.
omdb.step_save_desc: In the email content, first click on the activation link (the lowest box highlighted in red) to activate your key. Once activated, copy the API key (the upper box highlighted in red), paste it below, and click Save.

stashdb.title: StashDB Integration
stashdb.desc: StashDB is a community adult metadata database. By connecting it to SWAYA, you can automatically retrieve scene details, performer profiles (with physical attributes), tags, and studio links.
stashdb.step_intro_desc: StashDB is a community adult metadata database. Integrating it with SWAYA lets you automatically retrieve performers, studios, physical attributes, tags, and scene descriptions for your adult media collection.
stashdb.step_register_desc: Register a new account at StashDB. Registration requires an active invite key. Copy and use one of the two active invite codes below. If both codes have expired, click the link to contact the StashDB Admins and politely request a new invite key.
stashdb.step_activate_desc: Open the verification email from StashDB, click the activation link (valid for 2 hours), and choose your username and password. Note: Avoid using your email address or special characters (like / or #) as your username.
stashdb.step_save_desc: Log into StashDB.org, click on your username in the top-right corner next to the profile icon, copy your unique API Key, and paste it here.

fansdb.title: FansDB Integration
fansdb.desc: FansDB matches metadata and performer profiles for independent content creators (OnlyFans, Fansly, etc.) with your local files.
fansdb.step_intro_desc: FansDB is an invite-only crowdsourced metadata database focused on independent adult creators from adult creator platforms.
fansdb.step_apply_desc: FansDB is currently invite-only. Click the link below to open the application form and submit your request to join.
fansdb.step_register_desc: Once you receive your invite code, navigate to the registration page, fill in your details, and register. Log in using your username (not your email address).
fansdb.step_save_desc: Log into FansDB, click on your username at the top of the menu bar, copy your unique API Key, and paste it here.

porndb.title: ThePornDB Integration
porndb.desc: ThePornDB integration lets you fetch studio scene metadata, high-resolution covers, and performer details.
porndb.step_intro_desc: ThePornDB integration lets you fetch studio scene metadata, high-resolution covers, and performer details.
porndb.step_register_desc: Go to the registration page, fill in the form (username, email, password, and confirm password), and submit to create your free account.
porndb.step_token_desc: Log in and navigate to the API Tokens page. Enter a name for your token (avoid using your email address as the token name) and click Create.
porndb.step_save_desc: A popup window will display your new token. IMPORTANT: Copy the token immediately! For your security, it will not be shown again once you close the popup (otherwise you will have to generate a new one). Paste it below and click Save.

offline.title: Local (Offline) Mode
offline.desc: SWAYA can scan, organize, and play your media collection fully offline without any API keys.
offline.step_single_desc:
SWAYA works fully offline without any API keys!

• Video Snapshotting: The program automatically extracts technical file metadata and captures a video frame to use as the cover and backdrop image.
• File Safety & Indexing: Physical files are kept safe. You have two options during organization: SWAYA can either organize files into a single target directory (configurable in settings) leaving the filenames untouched, or you can choose to skip moving/renaming entirely (available before running the organizer) and just index them in-place into the database.
• Library Categorization: SWAYA automatically groups scanned items in the Organizer into Movies, TV Shows, Extras (trailers, clips, samples), or Collisions (naming conflicts). Offline scanning matches and registers everything immediately without requiring manual matching.
• Video Classification: Offline scanning imports all video files under a generic category. Although folder or file name guessing is sometimes possible, doing so without an online database is unreliable and we want to avoid inaccurate guessing to prevent disappointment. Connecting external APIs guarantees high-precision movie/show classification.
• Full Library Experience: All core features work identically—you can rate movies, add comments, track watch history/counters, create playlists, select custom covers, and assign tags.
• Home Videos: Perfect for importing and cataloguing personal recordings.

Note: If you want the full SWAYA experience (automatic high-res posters, trailers, synopses, and cast profiles), you will need to add API keys. Read more details on the Organizer page or start the Feature Tour in the media library.
